entries.title: scout
entries.description: Autonomous knowledge management and daily briefing system. Monitors your work tools (Slack, Calendar, Linear, GitHub, etc.), synthesizes findings into a persistent knowledge base with a formal ontology, and delivers daily action items — all running unattended via scheduled Claude Code sessions. Six session types: Morning Briefing, Consolidation, Dreaming, Research, interactive Work sessions, and Meta Review. Pre-session hooks pre-compute KB staleness, recent git activity, PR state, and Claude Code session summaries before each run, trading a few seconds of shell work for large token savings inside the session.

entries.description: Give any agent senses (video/audio/image understanding) and OSINT reach (search/capture/monitor), organized around an investigation case. Built on pi with the tinycloud/Cloudglue perception backend.

entries.title: t3
entries.description: Personal code factory for multi-repo projects

entries.title: agent-rally-point
entries.description: Agent Rally Point — repo-local coordination surface for parallel coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini). Records claims, checks write boundaries, routes handoffs, and exposes room state via the rally CLI. Skills: agent-rally-point (per-session loop), rally-workflows (fan-out + dynamic-workflows protocol), mini-loop (per-task quality gate). Advisory-only hooks auto-fire on SessionStart + PreToolUse to surface room awareness and deconflict before edits — never blocks. Backend: rally CLI (cargo install --path crates/rally-cli).

entries.title: kimi-code-plugin-cc
entries.description: Bridge headless CLI agents (Kimi Code, Codex, …) into Claude Code with review and planning loops.

entries.title: godot
entries.description: Bundle of Godot 4 skills (C# and GDScript both first-class): GDScript web/mobile export and portrait-pet conventions, engine quirks, UI authoring, version-aware API lookup, asset generation, scaffolding, scene building, and headless visual QA.

entries.title: agentic-os
entries.description: Self-improving agent memory system with 9 skills (session lifecycle, memory management, knowledge sync, policy-gated self-improve) and 6 hooks, including a PreToolUse shell circuit breaker. Identity growth via gated candidate queues; scaling thresholds live in one SSoT script. MCP-Tool-Bridge Policy enforces clear roles (tool/introspection/knowledge) and hard no-gos against MCP-as-truth or cross-project mutation.

entries.title: gander
entries.description: A live Hollywood-Squares dashboard of your Claude Code agents and sub-agents — each one an animated avatar that acts out what it's doing (thinking, coding, reading, spawning, testing, erroring), with a recursive hierarchy view and animated information flow between parent and child agents. Driven automatically by Claude Code hooks.

entries.title: autumn
entries.description: Domain knowledge, CLI wrappers, scaffolding commands, and code review for the autumn-web Rust framework

entries.title: artsonia-mcp
entries.description: MCP server for Artsonia — natural-language access to student-art portfolios, comments, and fans

entries.title: ultragoal
entries.description: Tell Claude what you want once; it works until the job is verifiably done, then saves what it learned. Goals with checkable specs, independent verification, and a memory that grows.

entries.title: humanizer-ru
entries.description: Kills AI smell in Russian text. 54 patterns across 12 categories, 20 hard bans, 3 modes (rewrite / audit / targeted fix), voice calibration, quad-pass audit, 2025-2026 stylistic fingerprints. | Убивает запах нейросети в русском тексте. 54 паттерна в 12 категориях, 20 жёстких банов, 3 режима, калибровка голоса, quad-pass аудит, стилистические фингерпринты 2025-2026.

entries.title: jose-claudinho
entries.description: Your AI assistant manager for Sport5 Fantasy World Cup 2026 — reads the market, your team and rival top teams, learns from weekly snapshots, and recommends transfers, captain and lineup under the official rules.

entries.title: spec
entries.description: Spec-driven development plugin: research → ask → propose → HARD GATE → apply → verify → archive, enforced by 4 hooks (TBD scan / approval gate / archive audit / verify reminder), with scope-dispatched dev agents and a fresh-context verifier agent

entries.title: beaver
entries.description: Skills for product definition, system design, software architecture, specs, and verification — structure before code. Bundles defining-products, designing-systems, architecting-software, specifying-features, crafting-code, and verifying-completion.

entries.title: sdd-engineering-team
entries.description: Spec-Driven Development engineering team: an orchestrator plus seven specialist personas (product, project, full-stack engineer, quality engineer, QA analyst, debugger, UX designer) and an eleven-agent speckit generation pipeline. Ships with reusable skills, MCP server config, dashboard scripts, and runtime guardrail hooks.

entries.title: scalpel
entries.description: Surgical precision skills for AI-assisted development: focused workflows, careful implementation, and disciplined delivery

entries.title: cc-transcript
entries.description: Investigate Claude Code transcripts token-efficiently via the cc-transcript CLI: list, stats, grep, and show instead of reading raw JSONL.

entries.title: brag
entries.description: Turn the current project into a short, polished, shareable launch video using HyperFrames.

entries.title: codey
entries.description: Live legibility for Claude Code: narrates what Claude is doing and warns when it's stuck.

entries.title: senderkit
entries.description: Build complete messaging experiences right from your AI coding agent. Add transactional email, SMS, push, and web-push — welcome emails, OTPs, receipts, and more — then create templates, send, and monitor every message your app sends. One messaging layer, no provider lock-in.

entries.title: skills
entries.description: Build loop engineers: a file-based knowledge base your agents read/write (loops), plus a codebase harness (dev-local stack, e2e gate, an isolated cloud box per agent via crabbox, and verify-before-ship) so loops can run, test, and ship code autonomously.

entries.title: aiops
entries.description: AI-assisted dev workflow: grill, plan, implement, hard gates

entries.title: rag-reviewer
entries.description: Agentic PR review: hybrid RAG + code graph via MCP, review skills for Claude Code

entries.title: fable-discipline
entries.description: A discipline pack for agentic software work: milestone workflow (research → build → adversarial-review), artifact build (spec → TDD → review → live-validate → ship), research investigation (pre-register → controls → calibrated negatives → read-the-primary), measurement pipeline (complete gap-accounting → evidence-as-proof → recurring run → decision report), design workflow (DESIGN.md contract → tool-generated screens → port to code → versioned redesign), diagnostic loop (reproduce → observe boundaries → one hypothesis, smallest probe → fix at root), agent orchestration (model routing + verifier-≠-author + worktree isolation), compounding memory (5-stage STATE.md + Verified-by tags), and per-task execution rules. Nine auto-triggering skills plus /milestone-research, /milestone-build, /milestone-review. Generic and repo-agnostic — reads each repo's own CLAUDE.md for specifics.

entries.title: plannotator-effective-html
entries.description: plannotator-effective-html — a plugin for Claude Code

entries.title: void-grimoire
entries.description: Additive Claude Code skills, agents, and rules: session journaling, learned-correction persistence, prompt expansion, context discipline, and TypeScript/web rule baselines

entries.title: gnomcp
entries.description: Gno smart-contract skill + MCP server for gno.land: interrealm semantics, security auditing, Render() authoring, idiomatic patterns, and on-chain tools (read, deploy, call, sessions).

entries.title: anton-core
entries.description: Personal AI assistant — knowledge, tasks, code graph, session intelligence

entries.title: 200iqlabs-agent-skills
entries.description: Business advisor AI agent skills for founders and small companies

entries.title: ai-config
entries.description: d-morrison's personal Claude Code skills (PR/review workflow, grading, reprexes, R-package helpers) and slash commands.
